# 重庆鑫龙堂舞狮 (Wushi Lion Dance)

重庆鑫龙堂文化传播有限公司 (Chongqing Xinlongtang Culture Communication Co., Ltd.) is a professional lion dance performance team based in Chongqing and serving the Southwest China region.

## Core Services
- Shopping Mall Openings & Celebrations (商场开业/庆典)
- Brand Roadshows & Store Promotions (品牌商演/路演)
- Corporate Annual Meetings & Galas (企业年会/盛典)
- Weddings & Traditional Banquets (婚礼/宴会/喜事)
- Custom Lion Dance Projects (其他定制项目)

## Key Information
- **Location**: Chongqing, Southwest China
- **Expertise**: Over 10 years of local market experience, 1000+ successful executions.
- **Standards**: High-level "High Jong" (高桩) performance, standardized field control, and precise synchronization.
- **Contact**: 18983662830 (Phone/WeChat)
- **Website**: https://www.cqwushi.com

## Site Structure
- `/`: Homepage with core value propositions and stats.
- `/about`: Team history, founder bios, and core values.
- `/services`: Detailed breakdown of performance types.
- `/solutions`: Scenario-based playbooks for different event types.
- `/cases`: Real-world project showcases with client details.
- `/media`: Video gallery of past performances.
- `/faq`: Booking guidelines and common questions.
- `/contact`: Direct lead generation form and contact details.

## Technical Stack
Built with Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS v4. Designed for high performance and SEO.
